offer: For small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual categorization causes cash flow gaps. We convert raw bank transaction data into categorized cash flow reports instead of manual categorization using spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in categorizing cash flow from raw bank transactions.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for small accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about similar workflows
DM outreach to small accounting firms with demo video
Share insights in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry for transactions
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Develop a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
